message:
feat(fp-frame): add stack/unstack, closure-based apply_fn, and map_values

DataFrame.stack() pivots columns to rows (wide-to-long) with composite
index labels. DataFrame.unstack() inverts stack to reconstruct original
shape. DataFrame.apply_fn() and Series.apply_fn() accept Rust closures
for element-wise/column-wise/row-wise transformations. Series.map_values()
maps values via HashMap with NaN for unmapped keys. 5 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
